pillars: PILLAR 1: Gemini NOC Chat (server.cjs /api/chat reads this file)
PILLAR 5: Link diagnostics modal (App.jsx distToSegment hitbox)
PILLAR 7: Logical SVIs in Tab 0 (App.jsx filter Vlan|Loopback)
PILLAR 9: Reachability state (reachable+status → offline node/link rendering)
